text: Came here for my anniversary dinner. The mushroom risotto was perfectly creamy and our server Marco recommended a great Barolo to pair with it. The patio seating was lovely. Will definitely come back!

Food was excellent — the seared scallops were the highlight — but the wait for our table was 25 minutes past our reservation time. Service apologized which was nice. Would come back but call ahead to confirm wait times.
Terrible place. Staff are rude. Would not recommend to anyone.
Worst restaurant ever. The staff are extremely rude. Do not go here.
Awful experience. Rude staff. I would not recommend this place at all.

I'm a regular here but tonight was a disaster. Our server forgot our drinks, my entrée came out cold, and when I mentioned it the manager argued with me instead of apologizing. I've recommended this place to many friends over the years but won't be returning.
Excellent brunch! The eggs benedict with crab were outstanding. Service was attentive without being intrusive. Their cold brew is also some of the best I've had in the city.
